case_title: BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC VS BURGOS, FERNANDO A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $590.14 FILED BY BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC AS TO DEFENDANT BURGOS, FERNANDO A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $689.93 AS TO DEFENDANT BURGOS, FERNANDO A.
